languages.original_text: "Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: "Нунциус — невероятно утонченное творение священных алгоритмов, сопряженных с моими собственными. Мирянину сложно уразуметь как они работают, но ни один из них не нарушает заповеди Омниссии".

"Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: "Nuncius ist eine unglaublich komplexe Kreation aus heiligen und meinen eigenen Algorithmen. Obschon Laien seine Funktionsweise nicht erfassen können, verstößt nicht eine seiner Funktionen gegen die Gebote des Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius ist eine unglaublich komplexe Kreation aus heiligen und meinen eigenen Algorithmen. Obschon Laien seine Funktionsweise nicht erfassen können, verstößt nicht eine seiner Funktionen gegen die Gebote des Omnissiah."

languages.text: « Nuncius est une création incroyablement sophistiquée, fruit de l'entrelacement d'algorithmes sacrés avec mon esprit. Il est impossible pour un profane de saisir son fonctionnement exact, mais il ne bafoue en rien les commandements de l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius est une création incroyablement sophistiquée, fruit de l'entrelacement d'algorithmes sacrés avec mon esprit. Il est impossible pour un profane de saisir son fonctionnement exact, mais il ne bafoue en rien les commandements de l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: “努恩修斯是极为精密的造物，他由神圣算法与我自身的算法交织而成。教外人士难以理解其内在运作，但其中绝无一星半点违背欧姆尼赛亚戒律之处。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯是极为精密的造物，他由神圣算法与我自身的算法交织而成。教外人士难以理解其内在运作，但其中绝无一星半点违背欧姆尼赛亚戒律之处。”

languages.text: «Nuncius es una creación increíblemente sofisticada de algoritmos sagrados entrelazados con los míos. Es difícil que un laico comprenda su funcionamiento interno, pero todo cumple los mandamientos del Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius es una creación increíblemente sofisticada de algoritmos sagrados entrelazados con los míos. Es difícil que un laico comprenda su funcionamiento interno, pero todo cumple los mandamientos del Omnissiah».

languages.text: "ヌンシウスは、神聖なアルゴリズムに私自身のアルゴリズムを織り交ぜた、信じられないほど洗練された創造物だ。素人にはその内部構造を把握するのは難しいが、しかし、一つもオムニサイアの戒律に違反していない。"
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: "Nuncius, benimkilere dolanmış kutsal algoritmaların inanılmaz derecede sofistike bir yaratımıdır. Avamın onların iç işleyişini kavraması zordur ancak bir tanesi bile Hermesih'in emirlerini ihlal etmez."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."
